title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone having a music lesson. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A girl is having a piano lesson in a music room. She is sitting at the piano while her teacher is standing beside her and looking at the music. There are books and a guitar in the room.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone repairing a bicycle. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A young man is repairing his bicycle outside a house. He is kneeling on the ground and looking at the front wheel. There are tools, a helmet and a garage door behind him.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
